### Urban Outfitters Expands Beauty Offering With Exclusive Yes Day Launch
*Global Cosmetics News · Global · ★★★☆☆*

Urban Outfitters has become the exclusive US brick-and-mortar retail partner for skincare brand Yes Day, introducing the Gen Zalpha-focused brand to 60 stores nationwide and its e-commerce platform.

[Read more](https://www.globalcosmeticsnews.com/urban-outfitters-expands-beauty-offering-with-exclusive-yes-day-launch/)

### Air France Expands Beauty Partnerships With Sisley and Clarins Amenity Kits
*Global Cosmetics News · Global · ★★★☆☆*

Air France has introduced new premium amenity kits featuring skincare products from Sisley and Clarins across its long-haul La Première, Business and Premium cabins.

[Read more](https://www.globalcosmeticsnews.com/air-france-expands-beauty-partnerships-with-sisley-and-clarins-amenity-kits/)
